item.title: Preflet: Get real-time predictive insights
item.description: This Portuguese based Data Science Startup is trying to make predictive analysis accessible to everyone using its next gen platform called Preflet.

item.title: Training HaarCascade Model on Microsoft Azure.

item.title: Book Review: The Monk Who Sold His Ferrai
item.description: A book that will make you rethink about each and aspect of your life. The book is full of zen techniques to enrich your daily life and inspire you to live with discipline.

item.title: Quantum Computing and Microsoft Q#
item.description: Using Viola Jones algorithm to detect objects in realtime

Bhavin Jawade is a Graduate Student and Research Assistant at the University of Buffalo, State University of New York, pursuing his Masters in Computer Science. Previously he was a software engineer at Persistent Systems, Pune where he worked in the BFSI Domain. He graduated from S.G.S.I.T.S. College Indore (B.E. in Information Technology) in June 2019. He is also the co-lead of Facebook Developer Circle Indore. He has been deeply involved the building developer community ecosystem in Indore and has been a mentor for various hackathons in India, like Smart India Hackathon and Version Beta NIT Bhopal.
